items.title: Mississauga 3rd Annual Asian Night Market 2026
items.summary: Join us for the Mississauga 3rd Annual Asian Night Market 2026, returning to Square One Shopping Centre P6 from July 17 to 19, 2026. Located in the heart of one of Canada’s most diverse and vibrant cities, the Mississauga Asian Night Market has quickly become one of the city’s most exciting multicultural summer traditions.
items.venue: Square One Shopping Centre, P6 Parking Lot

items.title: Astronomy in Action
items.summary: Astronomy in Action is bringing a planetarium dome to Mississauga! Join this 360-degree immersive experience that turns the dome into a window to the universe. Take a trip to the moon, soar through the rings of Saturn, and visit distant galaxies, all without leaving your seat. There are shows for every explorer, from One World One Sky: Big Bird's Adventure , to The Great Cosmic Journey , a live-presented show that will take you from our home planet to the distant universe and beyond.

items.title: RED FM Summer Bhangra Jam 2026
items.summary: Step into a celebration of Punjabi culture where music, movement, and community take centre stage. Driven by the infectious rhythms of Bhangra, this festival brings high-energy performances and non-stop vibes to the heart of summer. Expect powerful dance showcases, live music, and an exciting lineup of performers bringing bold beats and vibrant traditions to life. Explore local vendors, enjoy flavourful eats, and take in an atmosphere filled with colour and celebration.

items.title: Music of the World – A Tribute to the Beautiful Game
items.summary: Celebrate the excitement, passion, and global spirit of the world’s most beloved game! Come experience the Mississauga Symphony Orchestra on Saturday, July 18 for a vibrant musical tour across continents, showcasing compositions inspired by some of football’s most iconic nations.

items.title: Watch the World Play – Final Game
items.summary: Catch the excitement of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Final at Mississauga Celebration Square on July 19 and experience the tournament’s biggest match surrounded by fellow fans on the big screens. Join soccer supporters from across the city and around the world for an unforgettable championship atmosphere as the world’s top teams compete for the title. m. Please note that event details and match schedules are subject to change.

items.title: Bollywood Monster Mashup 2026
items.summary: Celebrate the energy and spectacle of Bollywood with one of the biggest South Asian festivals of the summer. From star-studded performances to non-stop music and dance, this is where entertainment takes centre stage. Experience live concerts, electrifying dance performances, and a lineup of artists bringing Bollywood hits and beyond to life. Enjoy delicious food, explore vibrant vendors, and take in a festival atmosphere packed with colour, culture, and excitement.

items.title: ASD Band
items.summary: Join us for a special live performance featuring ASD Band , an award-winning group of four talented performers on the autism spectrum: vocalist Rawan Tuffaha , keyboardist Ron Adea , vocalist and lead guitarist Jackson Begley , and drummer Spenser Murray . Formed in 2019, ASD Band made an impressive debut performing alongside rock legend Roger Hodgson and a 43-piece orchestra on Give A Little Bit . Since then, the band has continued to captivate audiences with their musicianship, creativity, and inspiring journey.

items.title: A Glimpse into the Heart of a Singer-Songwriter
items.summary: Daphne Lane, and 10-year-old rising talent Kalia will take the stage for an evening of music and storytelling. Enjoy original songs performed by the artists who wrote them, hear the inspiration behind their work, and sing along to a selection of well-loved cover songs. Please note: This event is presented by a third-party organizer. Selecting “Prices & Tickets” will redirect you to an external website. The price listed above includes both the admission cost and the applicable third-party transaction fee.

items.title: Josh Warren's Groove Circus
items.summary: Join us for a performance by Josh Warren , a bassist, composer, and arranger originally from Victoria, BC. Currently completing his Bachelor of Music degree at Humber College, Josh has already performed on stages across Canada as both a bandleader and sought-after sideman. Known for his versatility, Josh performs across jazz, pop, rock, and soul, blending diverse influences into a distinctive sound that shines through in his original music. Please note: Events are weather permitting and subject to change.
